# Merge Template

Use this checklist before merging:

- [ ] Linked issue is correct
- [ ] Scope matches the issue
- [ ] Verification section is complete
- [ ] UI changes were reviewed if applicable
- [ ] No unrelated changes remain

Preferred merge strategy:

```text
Squash and merge
```

Merge title format:

```text
<type>: <summary>
```

Merge body template:

```md
## What

- 

## Verification

- 

## Notes

- 
```
